notes: semantics: element "button" inferred from the set name "Button" — inference is mechanical (name/axis table), review

variant axis "state" (default|hover|active|focus) IS the platform's interaction states, not API — promoted: the axis is NOT a prop; anatomy and base facts come from the 8 default-state variant(s); hover→hover, active→active, focus→focus-visible propose root state overrides

Button: 4 state-axis variant(s) wrapped an instance of the set's own base component — flattened before state diffing (same rule as the default variants); their captured componentProperties only FILL defaults of props the base anatomy already discovered
Button:root/startIcon: INSTANCE_SWAP-bound instance without a dedicated wrapper frame — slot proposed without layout, review

Button:root/startIcon: slot "startIcon" preferredValues name 1 component key(s) with no in-scope contract (b26c053080bd5f845829beb8a434724e954a0008) — not carried into `accepts` (import the referenced set(s) to resolve them by key)

Button:root/startIcon: slot "startIcon" design-time content "play" proposed as defaultContent [ds.play] — a STUB rendering the OBSERVED geometry only (dump v1.5 bbox + primary paint; PROVISIONAL — import the real child set to replace it)
Button:root/startIcon: visibility bound to BOOLEAN "hasStartIcon" — proposed as prop `hasStartIcon` (default true: the property definition's defaultValue, dump v1.5)
Button:root/Label: rides text style "body/sm" which is not a token-derived style — typography not proposed
Button:root/endIcon: INSTANCE_SWAP-bound instance without a dedicated wrapper frame — slot proposed without layout, review

Button:root/endIcon: slot "endIcon" preferredValues name 1 component key(s) with no in-scope contract (b26c053080bd5f845829beb8a434724e954a0008) — not carried into `accepts` (import the referenced set(s) to resolve them by key)

Button:root/endIcon: slot "endIcon" design-time content "pause" proposed as defaultContent [ds.pause] — a STUB rendering the OBSERVED geometry only (dump v1.5 bbox + primary paint; PROVISIONAL — import the real child set to replace it)
Button:root/endIcon: visibility bound to BOOLEAN "hasEndIcon" — proposed as prop `hasEndIcon` (default true: the property definition's defaultValue, dump v1.5)
Button:root: node opacity 0.4 rides boolean axis "isDisabled" (opaque when false) — proposed as stylesWhen { prop: isDisabled, styles: { opacity } } (dump v1.2)
base instance "Button": property "variant" is one of the set's own variant axes (pinned to primary, knockout, secondary, bare in the flattened variant(s)) — not promoted
base instance "Button": property "isDisabled" is one of the set's own variant axes (pinned to false in the flattened variant(s)) — not promoted

Button:root/Focus ring: drawn only in the focus state and carries a stroke — inverted to focus-visible outline overrides (outline-color/outline-width); its own corner radius is not carried (the outline follows the root's shape + offset), review
prop `isDisabled`: true/false variant axis proposed as a boolean (extract/reconcile.ts bool⇄axis rule)

prop `text`: the single text prop carries the component's main content — repo contracts bind main content to code prop "children" (ds.button convention); adopt by setting bindings.code.prop to "children" when this is the label (note-only, nothing renamed mechanically)
